name: dredmorpedia
description: Modern Dungeons of Dredmor encyclopedia and deterministic data toolchain.

scripts.build: pnpm run generate:check && node scripts/run-web-with-artifact.mjs build spike
scripts.build:official: pnpm run generate:official:check && node scripts/run-web-with-artifact.mjs build official-local
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.dev:official: pnpm run generate:official && node scripts/run-web-with-artifact.mjs dev official-local
scripts.dev:synthetic: pnpm run generate && node scripts/run-web-with-artifact.mjs dev spike
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run generate && node scripts/run-web-with-artifact.mjs test:e2e spike
